name: Fresh Mango Chutney
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Chinese preserved black beans, rinsed
1/4 cup Green onions, thinly sliced on the bias
2 Red jalapeno peppers, sliced in thin circles
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Transfer mixture to a glass jar or container with a tight-fitting lid.
4. Store in the refrigerator for at least 24 hours before consuming.
